transport.environment_policy: native runtime allowlist; no provider API keys inherited

paraphrased_evidence.A: It recasts apparent pleasure as temporary relief, conditioned preference, and failed satisfaction, then presents abstinence as release; however, repetition, sweeping claims, and deferred proof weaken credibility and momentum.
paraphrased_evidence.B: It recasts apparent pleasure as temporary relief, conditioned preference, and failed satisfaction, then presents abstinence as release; however, repetition, sweeping claims, and deferred proof weaken credibility and momentum.

parsed.generic_mechanism: Equivalent sequences of experiential contradiction, causal-loop explanation, and freedom framing produce equivalent belief movement, while repeated assurances without proportionate new evidence limit both equally.
